items.title: Protesters clash with police ahead of G7 summit in Geneva
items.dek: Swiss police deployed a water cannon and fired tear gas to disperse anti-G7 protesters after clashes.
items.body: Swiss police deployed a water cannon and fired tear gas to disperse anti-G7 protesters after clashes.

items.title: 'The first step of our story': Lewis Hamilton fina...
items.dek: Is the seven-time world champion back in peak form? It might be too soon to tell, but don't count him out, either.
